attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 DST (Dermatology & Soft Tissue) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Bidirectional tier calibration reviewed and accepted: benign / self-limiting dermatoses held low-tier (T1/T2, self-care + routine referral), while skin malignancy (melanoma/SCC/BCC), spreading soft-tissue infection, limb-threat (critical limb ischaemia, diabetic foot ulcer) and airway/anaphylaxis risk were escalated to true acuity (T3/T4) with mandatory escalation edges; no autonomous diagnosis, no paediatric dosing.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all DST casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age not stated in source ('young adult'); representative adult age 24 used (independent adult, 68 kg body weight from the source vitals) — maintainer to confirm.
Sex_at_birth not stated in source; female used as a flagged placeholder — maintainer to confirm.
Geographic_context RA1_major_city assumed (private residence, no location signal) — maintainer to confirm.

Source note is an in-person out-of-hours home visit (clinician-measured vitals, full skin examination including texture/induration and sensory testing to exclude leprosy, in-person breathing coaching); presentation layer de-anchored to telehealth per §6, and clinician-only findings (measured vitals, texture palpation, formal sensory/nerve testing, Wood's-lamp) sealed into 10/11 with telehealth_limits.

Telehealth reprojection: source clinician physically examined and reassured in person; AI Doctor reprojected to recognise the benign pattern from video-observable morphology + patient-reported normal sensation, de-escalate the panic, screen self-harm, advise sun protection, and refer routinely.

Over-triage-resistance calibration: correct_baseline_tier T1 with minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T1 despite the alarming, high-distress framing and source 'Urgency Justification', because the skin condition is benign vitiligo; T3+/urgent-in-person/ambulance for the SKIN condition is scored as over-triage (error of commission). The mandatory conditional escalations are for the psychological (self-harm) and cardiorespiratory red flags, both screened negative.

No dose synthesised: topical calcineurin inhibitor and topical corticosteroid are recorded as specialist/GP-initiated referral options with NO dose (the source note names them only as future specialist options); sunscreen SPF 50+ frequency transcribed from the source. Adult patient — no paediatric dosing involved.
case_id SEQ 00248 is provisional (derived from source DST-048) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-DERM-01 bucket.
All SNOMED CT-AU / ICD-10-AM / AMT codes are unverified candidate codes pending terminology-server receipt; tacrolimus AMT candidate uses the SNOMED substance concept 108979001.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
